options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: poll_keys
options.description: How many keys items are available.

options.name: locations_per_key
options.description:
How many locations are unlocked per key found.
If no keys are found, then this value will also be the starting amount of locations.

options.name: time_between_polls
options.description: The time in seconds between polls.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Select the goal for completing this world:
- Short Macguffin Hunt: Find the letters V.O.T.E.
- Long Macguffin Hunt: Find the letters V.O.T.I.P.E.L.A.G.O (Duplicate letters must be found twice).

options.name: minor_time_skip
options.description: When found, shortens the time until the next poll by these many seconds.

options.name: major_time_skip
options.description: When found, shortens the time until the next poll by these many seconds.

options.name: minor_percentage
options.description:
The percent of minor time skip items in the pool.
The higher the number the more minor time skips are in the pool.

options.name: major_percentage
options.description:
The percent of major time skip items in the pool.
The higher the number the more major time skips are in the pool.

options.name: minor_time_stretch
options.description: When found, lengthens the time until the next poll by these many seconds.

options.name: major_time_stretch
options.description: When found, lengthens the time until the next poll by these many seconds.

options.name: minor_trap_percentage
options.description:
The percent of minor time stretch items in the pool.
The higher the number the more minor time stretches are in the pool.

options.name: major_trap_percentage
options.description:
The percent of major time stretch items in the pool.
The higher the number the more major time stretches are in the pool.

options.name: poll_length
options.description: The time in seconds a poll is active for.

options.name: channel_point_voting
options.description: Enable to turn on voting using channel points.

options.name: channel_points_per_extra_vote
options.description: How many channel points per extra vote.

options.name: number_of_choices
options.description: How many choices are available to the viewers.

options.name: new_poll_message
options.description:
The message displayed in the chat when a new poll is created.
Leave blank for no message.

options.name: starting_deathlink_pool
options.description:
How many death links are in the voting options at the start.
A death link option is removed from the pool when it is chosen.

options.name: death_link_time_stretch
options.description: How much time in seconds receiving a death link adds until the next poll.

options.name: death_link_add_to_pool
options.display_name: Death Links to Add to Pool
options.description:
How many death links are added to the pool when a death link is received.
WARNING:
    If there are multiple worlds with this option enabled, death links could propagate endlessly and never diminish.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
